creator: rnoll.bsd@gmail.com
text:
When testing fix to bug #246515, ran in to packaging error where 5 files are "No such file or directory". The files are test_avformat, test_iks, test_mod_av, test_nlsml, and test_srgs.

Possible solution: remove these files from the pkg-plist file.

After removing from pkg-plist, another compile run was completed and the package was built using my local configuration. The package was built using Poudriere.

File attachments will be uploaded.
